TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Talampo, title = Talampo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Talampo} }

S.FORM: alang Talampo ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 71 buwan, 127 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 124 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 91%, Paywan 2%, Setik 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Talampo hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Talampo hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Talampo hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Talampo hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Talampo hya' ga Monating. tay 'llaw na Talampo hya' ga Cihalaay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Talampo ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Talampo ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 71 buwan, 127 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 124 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 91%, Paywan 2%, Setik 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Talampo hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Talampo hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Talampo hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Talampo hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Talampo hya' ga Monating. tay 'llaw na Talampo hya' ga Cihalaay. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Talampo ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ talampo ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na talampo ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na talampo ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na talampo ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na talampo ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na talampo ħjaʔ ɣa monatiŋ. taj ʔllaw na talampo ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiħalaaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ talampo ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
